subtopics.title: Major Body Systems
common_misconceptions: The heart is on the left side (it's centered, slightly left)
Food is digested only in the stomach (starts in mouth)
Bones are dry and dead (they are living tissues)
subtopics.teaching_note: Digestive: mouth → oesophagus → stomach → small intestine → large intestine. Respiratory: nose → trachea → lungs (oxygen in, CO₂ out). Circulatory: heart pumps blood through arteries, veins, capillaries. Nervous: brain, spinal cord, nerves. Excretory: kidneys filter waste from blood. Skeletal: 206 bones, supports body, protects organs. Health education: balanced diet, exercise, hygiene, avoiding drugs/substance abuse.
